name: PageLaunch
tagline: Build high-converting pages without the high-converting price
metaDescription: PageLaunch replaces Unbounce with a drag-and-drop landing page builder inside AppBuster. A/B test, publish, and convert — saving $1,188/year.
heroSvg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><text x="50" y="70" text-anchor="middle" font-size="60">🚀</text></svg>

features.title: Drag-and-Drop Builder
features.desc: Visually design landing pages with a block-based editor. Choose from pre-built sections for heroes, testimonials, pricing tables, and CTAs — no code required.

features.title: A/B Testing
features.desc: Split traffic between page variants and let the data pick the winner. Test headlines, layouts, CTAs, and images to continuously improve conversion rates.

features.title: Mobile-First Design
features.desc: Every page is fully responsive out of the box with independent mobile and desktop editing. Preview and fine-tune the experience on any screen size.

features.title: Instant Publishing
features.desc: Publish pages to your custom domain with one click and near-zero load times. Built-in CDN delivery ensures fast page loads from anywhere in the world.

features.title: Lead Capture Forms
features.desc: Embed customizable forms with conditional fields and multi-step flows. Captured leads sync directly to your CRM or email list in real time.

features.title: Popup & Sticky Bar Builder
features.desc: Create exit-intent popups, scroll-triggered overlays, and sticky announcement bars. Target visitors by page, referrer, or visit count for precise messaging.
